message:
✨ acmm: add 'What is ACMM?' link to re-open the intro modal (#8370)

Users who dismissed the intro modal had no way back to it. Adds a small
info-icon link inside the sticky picker bar above the input row — same
column the user is already looking at.

Lifted the modal's open-state out of useACMMIntroModal and into
ACMMProvider so the picker can re-trigger via openIntro() without
remounting the modal. ACMM.tsx renders an inline ACMMIntroModalConnector
that reads context and passes props to the still-pure modal component.

The 'don't show again' localStorage check still controls the auto-open
behavior on first visit; openIntro() always opens regardless of
dismissal — manual recall always wins.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
